title: Chestnut Salad with Date Dressing
description: A simple salad made with roasted chestnuts, mixed greens, and a sweet date dressing.
instructions: Rinse the chestnuts and pat them dry with a paper towel.
Wrap the chestnuts in foil and roast for 15-20 minutes, or until tender.
Let the chestnuts cool slightly, then peel and chop them.
In a blender or food processor, combine the dates, water, and a pinch of salt.
Blend until smooth to make the date dressing.
In a large bowl, combine the mixed greens, chopped chestnuts, and date dressing.
Toss to combine and serve immediately.
Optional: Add your favorite salad to the bowl and toss to combine.
